name: swiftride-vtc
description: SwiftRide VTC Luxury Showcase Website and Booking System

scripts.build: node -e "if (process.platform !== 'win32') { const fs = require('fs'); ['node_modules/.bin/vite', 'node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild', 'node_modules/@esbuild/linux-x64/bin/esbuild'].forEach(p => { try { fs.chmodSync(p, 0o755); } catch(e){} }) }" && vite build
